summary: Iteration 28 - Auth Gate, Video URL Support, and File Download Testing Complete. All features working correctly: (1) Auth gate overlay appears on /procedures/:id and /immobilier/:id when user is NOT logged in with Lock icon and SE CONNECTER/CREER UN COMPTE buttons. (2) Auth gate does NOT appear when user IS logged in. (3) Auth gate login button correctly redirects to /connexion. (4) File download from procedure detail page works - programmatic fetch+blob download with proper Content-Disposition header. (5) Backend API returns video_url at procedure level and step level. (6) Backend API accepts video_url and links in POST/PUT for procedures and steps. (7) Procedure builder shows video URL input (data-testid='proc-video-url') and step video URL input (data-testid='step-video-0'). (8) Fixed nested button HTML warning by changing outer button to div in ProcedureDetailPage.js.

issues: Console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <select>/<option>' - cosmetic hydration warning from React dev tools, does not affect functionality

backend_api: GET /api/procedures/:id - Returns procedure with video_url field
GET /api/procedures/:id - Returns steps with video_url and links fields
POST /api/procedures - Creates procedure with video_url at procedure level
POST /api/procedures - Creates procedure with step video_url and links
GET /api/procedures/files/:file_id/download - Returns file with Content-Disposition header
GET /api/procedures/:id - Public access works (no auth required for reading)
GET /api/properties/:id - Public access works (no auth required for reading)
frontend_ui: Auth gate overlay appears on /procedures/:id when NOT logged in (data-testid='auth-gate-overlay')
Auth gate overlay appears on /immobilier/:id when NOT logged in (data-testid='auth-gate-overlay')
Auth gate overlay does NOT appear when user IS logged in on both pages
Auth gate login button (data-testid='auth-gate-login-btn') links to /connexion
Auth gate register button (data-testid='auth-gate-register-btn') links to /connexion
File download from procedure detail page works - button with data-testid='download-file-{id}' triggers download
Procedure builder shows video URL input field (data-testid='proc-video-url')
Procedure builder step shows video URL input field (data-testid='step-video-{index}')
Procedure builder step shows 'LIENS UTILES' section with '+ Ajouter un lien' button
Files section shows in procedure detail (data-testid='files-section')

critical_code_review_comments: AuthGateOverlay component correctly checks for token presence to show/hide overlay
handleDownload function uses programmatic fetch+blob approach to download files (more reliable than <a> tag)
Backend properly returns video_url at both procedure and step levels in enrich_procedure helper
Backend sanitizes video_url using sanitize_url helper in both create and update operations
Fixed nested button HTML issue in ProcedureDetailPage.js - changed outer button to div to prevent hydration warning

success_rate.backend: 100% (11/11 tests passed, 3 skipped due to OTP auth)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth gate feature fully implemented and tested. Auth gate overlay shows on procedure and property detail pages when user is not logged in. File download uses programmatic fetch+blob approach. Video URL and links support added at both procedure level and step level. ProcedureBuilder has data-testid='proc-video-url' for procedure video and data-testid='step-video-{index}' for step videos. Fixed nested button HTML issue in ProcedureDetailPage - outer element is now div with cursor-pointer instead of button.
